testcase.name: verifyBackupStatusFlow

testcase.name: verifyCountdownReachesZeroAndNextRunUpdates
testcase.system-out: Page Status: Status: Scheduled Test Passed

testcase.name: verifyCountdownTimerDecreasesSmoothly

failure.message: Countdown timer did not decrease smoothly. Expected ~5 seconds decrease, but was: 3 expected [true] but found [false]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Countdown timer did not decrease smoothly. Expected ~5 seconds decrease, but was: 3 expected [true] but found [false] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:1578) at testcase.name: verifyCountdownTimerStyling
testcase.system-out: Countdown font size: 22.4px Countdown color (hex): #007bff Countdown text: 23h 59m 56s

testcase.name: verifyCountdownTimerisAccurate
testcase.system-out: Raw Next Run Text = Next Scheduled Run: 2026-05-19 15:43:00 Clean Next Run Text = 2026-05-19 15:43:00 Countdown UI = 23h 59m 53s

testcase.name: verifyHandlingFailedBackups
testcase.system-out: Current Status: Current Status: Scheduled Current Status: Scheduled Current Status: Scheduled Current Status: Scheduled Current Status: Scheduled Current Status: Scheduled Current Status: Scheduled Current Status: Scheduled Current Status: Scheduled Current Status: Scheduled Current Status: Failed Backup Status: Failed | Last File: N/A | Last Run: 2026-05-18 15:44:00 Backup Status: Failed | Last File: N/A | Last Run: 2026-05-18 15:44:00

testcase.name: verifyHeadingAndLabelsStyling
testcase.system-out: Heading font size: 24px Label 'Scheduled Time:' - Font: 700, Size: 16px, Color: rgb(0, 0, 0) Label 'Last File:' - Font: 700, Size: 16px, Color: rgb(0, 0, 0) Label 'Last Run:' - Font: 700, Size: 16px, Color: rgb(0, 0, 0) Label 'Status:' - Font: 700, Size: 16px, Color: rgb(0, 0, 0) Label 'Next Scheduled Run:' - Font: 700, Size: 16px, Color: rgb(0, 0, 0) Value 'Failed' - Font: 700, Size: 16px, Color: rgb(255, 0, 0) Value '2026-05-19 15:44:00' - Font: 400, Size: 16px, Color: rgb(0, 0, 0) UI styling verified for headings, labels, and values.

testcase.name: verifyLastFileNameValidation
testcase.system-out: UI Last File value = Last Run: 2026-05-18 15:45:00

testcase.name: verifyLongFileNameWrapsInsideCorrectly
testcase.system-out: UI Shows: Last File: This_is_a_very_very_long_backup_filename_with_special_chars_@_#_$_%_and_more_______________________________final_test_file.txt overflow = visible white-space = normal overflowWrap = normal wordWrap = normal Long filename displayed correctly and wraps inside UI

testcase.name: verifyNextScheduledRunCalculatedCorrectly
testcase.system-out: UI Raw: Next Scheduled Run: 2026-05-18 15:47:59 UI Next Run: 2026-05-18 15:47:59 Time Difference: 1 sec Next Scheduled Run verified successfully!

testcase.name: verifyNoSensitiveDataLeakage
testcase.system-out: Current Status: Current Status: Scheduled Current Status: Scheduled Current Status: Scheduled Current Status: Scheduled Current Status: Scheduled Current Status: Scheduled Current Status: Scheduled Current Status: Scheduled Current Status: Scheduled Current Status: Scheduled Current Status: Scheduled Current Status: Scheduled Current Status: Scheduled Current Status: Scheduled Current Status: Scheduled Current Status: Scheduled Current Status: Scheduled Current Status: Scheduled Current Status: Scheduled Current Status: Scheduled Current Status: Scheduled Current Status: Success Last File Shown: Last File: file2.txt Security Validation Passed – No sensitive data leakage detected.

testcase.name: verifyPageRefreshPerformance
testcase.system-out: Initial Countdown:23h 59m 50s Initial Status: Success Cycle 1 - Countdown: 23h 59m 34s Cycle 1 - Status: Success Cycle 2 - Countdown: 23h 59m 18s Cycle 2 - Status: Success Cycle 3 - Countdown: 23h 59m 02s Cycle 3 - Status: Success Cycle 4 - Countdown: 23h 58m 46s Cycle 4 - Status: Success Page refreshed smoothly without any flicker or data loss

testcase.name: verifyResponsiveLayout
testcase.system-out: Checking UI in DesktopView:1366x768 UI adjusts properly in Desktop, Tablet, Mobile view Checking UI in TabletView:768x1024 UI adjusts properly in Desktop, Tablet, Mobile view Checking UI in MobileView:375x812 UI adjusts properly in Desktop, Tablet, Mobile view

testcase.name: verifyScheduledTimeCorrectlyDisplayed
testcase.system-out: UI Last Run Timestamp = 2026-05-18 15:47:00 BACKUP_HISTORY_FILE = [/usr/local/tomcat/webapps/Docker_backup/backup_history.txt] Absolute Path = /usr/local/tomcat/webapps/Docker_backup/backup_history.txt File Exists = true File Readable = true File Timestamp = 2026-05-18 15:47:00 SUCCESS: UI timestamp matches backup history file.

testcase.name: verifyScheduledTimeMatchesConfiguredTime
testcase.system-out: Configured Time = 16:44 Displayed Time = 16:44 Scheduled Time matches correctly!

testcase.name: verifyTimeFormatvalidation
testcase.system-out: Scheduled Time:16:44 Last Run:2026-05-18 15:48:25 Next Scheduled Run:2026-05-18 16:43:59 All time fields are valid

testcase.name: verifyWelcomePageWhenNoBackupsExist
testcase.system-out: Last Backup: None Total Backups: 0 Files Last Backup: 0 Status: Scheduled Passed — Welcome page correctly handles 'No backup history' state

testcase.name: verifyBackupSummaryConsistency
testcase.system-out: Dashboard - Last File: 0 Dashboard - Last Run: None Dashboard - Status: Scheduled Dashboard - Next Run: 0 Backup Status - Last File: None Backup Status - Last Run: None Backup Status - Status: Scheduled Backup Status - Next Run: 2026-05-19 14:43:00 Backup summary is consistent between Dashboard and Backup Status page.

testcase.name: verifyBackupTimeReflectsSystemClock
testcase.system-out: Backup Status Check 1: Success Dashboard Values: Last Backup Time = 2026-05-18 15:26:14 Total Backups = 1 Files Last Backup = 1 Status = Success FUN-07 Validation Passed – Dashboard updated correctly!

testcase.name: verifyDashboardHandlesLargeBackupCount
testcase.system-out: Total Backups displayed: 1 X position of Total Backups element: 647

testcase.system-out: Navigation to login page verified. Login page elements verified and login button is clickable.

testcase.system-out: Button hover color: rgb(25, 118, 210)

testcase.name: verifyNoOverlappingElements
testcase.system-out: No overlapping elements detected on the welcome page.

testcase.name: verifyPageLoadSpeed
testcase.system-out: Page load time: 34 ms

testcase.name: verifyScreenReaderCompatibility
testcase.system-out: Screen reader compatible elements verified: numbers and headings display correctly.

testcase.name: verifyStatsAlignment
testcase.system-out: Last Backup Time: 2026-05-18 15:26:14 X position: 397 Total Backups Completed: 1 X position: 397 Files in Last Backup: 1 X position: 397 Status: Success X position: 397 All statistics are aligned correctly.
